$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C7 2026-07-17): RUN witness for the `CONST`->`const` compat macro (tcl.json macros). A TCL object command whose signature uses the OLD-Tcl `Tcl_Obj *CONST objv[]` form (30 of 44 sqlite src/test*.c use it; the dominant test-TU blocker after the C6 extern-aggregate fix — 16 TUs P0001'd 'expected ) got objv' on the unexpanded CONST). DSS expands CONST->const, so the const-pointer array param decays to `Tcl_Obj *const *` + binds to Tcl_CreateObjCommand's fn-ptr param; libtcl calls SumCmd back on the parsed args of `mysum 40 2` -> 42. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 legs run it (libtcl8.6), native-arm64 arch-gates, windows/macos compile-only. RED-ON-DISABLE: remove the CONST macro from tcl.json -> `Tcl_Obj *CONST objv[]` P0001s -> fails to compile.
